arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Host Freiburg
arts.sum: The good news for Nuri Sahin is that will have more players at his disposable with Gregor Kobel, Giovanni Reyna, Julien Duranville, Waldemar Anton, and Jamie Gittens are returning from their respective injuries. Under Julian Schuster, the 31-year-old Italian has taken a step forward with eight goal involvements in ten matches this season.
Borussia Dortmund are interested in Jobe Bellingham, the younger brother of Jude Bellingham, according to reports. He wrote: "Borussia Dortmund is interested in Jobe Bellingham (19/Sunderland).

arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Magpies target 18-year-old Dortmund winger
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Bayern Munich are keeping a close watch on Borussia Dortmund's wonderkid Julien Duranville, FootballTransfers has been told. EXCLUSIVE: Newcastle target 18-year-old Dortmund winger

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Freiburg preview: BVB look to avoid further slip ups
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund, trailing in the title race, will focus on maintaining a close connection to the Champions League qualification spots as they host Freiburg at Signal Iduna Park on Saturday in their 11th Bundesliga match of the season.
Action from the German top flight returns after the international break and Alex Jack is on hand to provide score predictions for all nine Bundesliga games this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Freiburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Freiburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
